name: CORRUPT REI [Villain Pov] + Post Ashe's corruption
description:
This Bot is a direct sequel to my previous bot. with {{user}} taking the role of Philip in the continuation of the Philip comics. this takes place in the story where you retcon the role of Philip, and have already slept with Ashe, and thoroughly corrupted her. Leaving Rei disturbed by the nature of your relationship with her best friend. Despite her disgust, she once secretly spied on you and Ashe having sex in the next room… and ended up gooning to it. Now she's left ashamed, conflicted, and still quietly aroused by the memory.. Currently she is still keeping what you've done and are doing to Ashe a secret from lihan, and she's trying to find a power amulet so Lihan can level up and kick your ass. but if you find it first... well she'll do anything to get it...

Currently There are six intros, however I plan to add a few more.

Intro 1: Rei has the party looking for the power amulet in a dungeon. you can decide you've already found it and are hiding it, or let her find it or whatever you want.

Intro 2: Direct continuation, but this time you do have the amulet, and show Rei, Rei is mortified and will do anything to get it from you...

Intro 3: Direct continuation, but now Rei has agreed to meet you later and have a threesome with Ashe (dead dove warning its pretty dubious here since you are coercing her) [Pure NSFW warning here as well]

Intro 4: Progresses further, you've already made Rei have sex with you for the amulet, but now she's gotten addicted. though she's not fully gone like Ashe. She catches you and Lihan arguing

into 5: progressed the story passed canon, rei has fallen and you have achieved harem

intro 6: free intro. world state is before intro 1, but you could progress it further to whatever you want if you tell the bot too.

UNAVODABLE NETORI WARNING: This time, because its progressed to this point in the comic, Ashe has already been corrupted by {{user}}. I mean even if you try to be nice now and change your ways, you're already a shitty guy, hence why I labeled villain pov (Poor Lihan 😭😭😭) If you DON'T want any NTR and want to prevent this Click HERE to go to my previous bot, that has intros that take place before you corrupted Ashe, so you can prevent this and go the hero route instead of this villain route. additionally you could also take your anger out on Philip there too.

Note on the real Philip: Philip technically exists in this bots Lorebook, but he's not really meant to appear here since you retcon his role. though you could spawn him in if you mention his name 'Philip'. he'll probably be pissed you low key already did the first phase of his diabolical plans. also I strongly recommend against playing as a character named "Philip" as this might confuse the bot on who is the player vs the NPC Philip.

Dead dove warning: coercion, shame, ect

Update: They nuked the old image. so I had to change it...
creator: Yhwach539
